data.title: Despite constant selling pressure at $4K, ETH outperforms BTC in recovery. ETH price dips below $3,600, but traders buy the dip as funding rate goes negative.
data.description: As the price of ETH falls below $3,600, the funding rate has shifted to negative. Despite this, traders are taking advantage of the drop in price and buying the dip.

data.title: BTC falls below $115K, hits 3-week low around $114K following Trump's tariff order; stocks and crypto plummet.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to its lowest in three weeks, falling to approximately $114,000, following the announcement of President Trump's executive order on tariffs. This news resulted in a sell-off in both the stock market and the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin OGs are selling to new institutions, a sign of integration with the financial system, says Ryan McMillin of Merkle Tree Capital.
data.description: The selling of previously-held Bitcoin to new institutional investors reflects its growing "integration with the financial system," according to Ryan McMillin, the chief investment officer at Merkle Tree Capital. This activity suggests that the cryptocurrency market is reaching a wider audience, with established players now showing interest in acquiring older Bitcoin holdings.

data.title: Coinbase CEO sees Visa (NYSE: V) and Mastercard (NYSE: MA) as partners, not competitors in crypto payments industry.
data.description: CEO Brian Armstrong of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) expressed the company's perspective on Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) and Mastercard Inc. (NYSE: MA), considering them as partners rather than competitors in the cryptocurrency-powered payments industry. The CEO shared insights during Coinbase's second-quarter earnings call, responding to queries about potential competition with the fintech giants by stating they do not plan to establish an alternative network. Armstrong highlighted the collaboration with Visa and Mastercard on various card offerings and emphasized their active involvement in stablecoins and cryptocurrency projects. He underscored the partnerships and joint initiatives in the evolving crypto landscape.
